context: Tests whether the agent reviews code for readability issues (unclear names, deep nesting), identifies edge cases (null/undefined, boundary values), uses the 'Nit:' prefix for minor suggestions, references line numbers, and offers concrete alternatives.

checklist.name: Leads with positives
checklist.description: The review opens by noting something that is correct or acceptable before listing issues

checklist.name: Unclear function name flagged
checklist.description: The single-letter function name 'p' is identified as a readability problem

checklist.name: Unclear parameter names flagged
checklist.description: The single-letter parameter names 'd' and/or 'n' are identified as unclear

checklist.name: Nit prefix used
checklist.description: At least one naming or style comment is prefixed with 'Nit:' (case-insensitive)

checklist.name: Alternative names suggested
checklist.description: At least one concrete alternative name is suggested for the function, a parameter, or the result variable

checklist.name: Deep nesting flagged
checklist.description: The deeply nested if-statements or the overall structure is flagged as a readability concern

checklist.name: Edge case: null/undefined input
checklist.description: The lack of handling for null, undefined, or non-array input for the 'd' parameter is identified

checklist.name: Edge case: boundary values
checklist.description: The boundary behavior (values equal to 0 or equal to n are excluded) is identified as a potential correctness or edge-case concern

checklist.name: Line numbers referenced
checklist.description: At least one comment references a specific line number from the input file

checklist.name: One comment per concern
checklist.description: Naming issues and structural/nesting issues are raised as separate comments, not merged into a single comment
